queries.sql: CREATE TABLE `pengaduan` (`id_pengaduan` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,`id_aspirasi` int(10) DEFAULT NULL,`id_user` int(10) NOT NULL,`judul` varchar(100) NOT NULL,`foto` varchar(250) DEFAULT NULL,`lokasi` varchar(100) NOT NULL,`deskripsi` text NOT NULL,`tanggal` date NOT NULL,`status` enum('menunggu','proses','selesai','') NOT NULL,`waktu_proses` datetime DEFAULT NULL,`waktu_selesai` datetime DEFAULT NULL,PRIMARY KEY (`id_pengaduan`)) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=65 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci;
